Video.summary: Tyrone reveals Iafa's DNA test results and helps her explore her heritage's cuisine.
Video.title: Meet Iafa Almeida Cac

Video.summary: Desiree makes a cashew butter smoothie, a sage-fried tofu scramble, tempura vegetables and apple butter-pecan-Gorgonzola turnovers.
Video.title: Healthy and Delicious

Video.summary: Desiree makes a colorful tonic, a sweet potato hash, a warm romaine lettuce, challah, and lasagna.
Video.title: Lettuce Eat Lasagna

Video.summary: Desiree prepares recipes for life on the go, including a green juice, a breakfast burrito, a beet salad and a flourless almond cake.
Video.title: A Lot on Your Plate

Video.summary: Desiree prepares a breakfast of spiralized fried potatoes with eggs and hollandaise.
Video.title: Easy Comfort Food

Video.summary: Desiree uses blueberries, celery, cucumber, oranges and red cabbage to make a juice.
Video.title: Treat Yourself

Video.summary: Desiree prepares a strawberry, apple and ginger juice, breakfast cookies, a tabbouleh and sundried tomato hummus, a green curry vegetable pot pie and a Moroccan vegetable tagine.
Video.title: Meals on the Go

Video.summary: Tyrone surprises Bianca with her DNA results and helps her explore her newly-found heritage's cuisine.
Video.title: Meet Bianca Osbourne

Video.summary: Tyrone surprises PJ Kerr with his DNA results; he also helps him explore his newfound heritage's cuisine.
Video.title: Meet PJ Kerr

Video.summary: Desiree shakes up a classic recipe with kefir, makes a warm breakfast and two grilled cheese recipes.
Video.title: On Trend

Video.summary: Matt gets down and dirty playing some beach volleyball; in between bumps, sets, and spikes, the RG team serves up a smorgasbord of great food.
Video.title: Volleyball Tournament

Video.summary: Inspired by flaky, buttery and chocolaty dishes, host Vanessa cooks up four classic French recipes that'll have you saying oh la la.
Video.title: French Brunch

Video.summary: Mary Bosco discovers her newfound roots through DNA analysis and celebrates them through cooking.
Video.title: Meet Mary Bosco

Video.summary: Four chefs turn a French classic on its head.
Video.title: Cassoulet

Video.summary: Chef Siobhan Detkavich cooks for Taurus; what an earth sign with a ruling planet of Venus eats.
Video.title: Taurus

Video.summary: The youngest and first Indigenous woman to ever compete on Top Chef Canada explores each of the 12 Zodiac signs and their connections to food.
Video.title: Spring Special

Video.summary: Shahir Massoud tries recipes from "In Mary's Kitchen" by Mary Berg.
Video.title: In Mary's Kitchen

Video.summary: Recipes from Taste Canada award-winning cookbooks, highlighting unique food.
Video.title: Tava

Video.summary: Recipes from Taste Canada award-winning cookbooks, highlighting unique food.
Video.title: Start Here

Video.summary: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik show that food really is the language of love.
Video.title: Childhood Memories

Video.summary: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik show that food really is the language of love.
Video.title: Long and Short of It

Video.summary: Steak perfection is achieved through seared crust, tenderness, and precise griddle cooking.
Video.title: Searing Steak Perfection

Video.summary: Pancakes bring classic flavors and golden griddle perfection to every plate.
Video.title: Flippin Fantastic
